name: Taller Claude Code + Ollama
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && mv /usr/local/bin/ollama /usr/local/bin/ollama.real && cp /workspaces/taller-claude-code/ollama /usr/local/bin/ollama && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ollama && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv python install 3.14.0 && cd /workspaces/taller-claude-code/free-claude-code && uv sync && uv pip install -e . && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
